title: desmodium triquetrum subsp. pseudotriquetrum
intro: Desmodium triquetrum subsp. pseudotriquetrum, also known as button clover, is a perennial legume native to Australia, New Zealand, and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, fever, and pain due to its presence of triterpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of button clover include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Button clover can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried extract, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
